name: Stick Legions
description: Monsters have attacked your village! You are the only survivor! Are you ready to shoulder the important task of saving the village and defeating the army of monsters? Come and play Stick Legins to rescue your stickman companions, drive away monsters, and become a hero of justice!
instructions: 1 Tap to move 2 Think about how to proceed to the next step 3 Rescue your companions and upgrade your strength
tags: Battle, Boy, Fight, HTML5, Kid, Kids, Mobile, Online, Puzzle, Stickman, Strategy, War
